preview.summary: Scotland face a sterner test against reigning AFCON champions Morocco, the top-ranked African side and a 2022 semi-finalist. Steve Clarke's men will look to frustrate a Moroccan team that presses high and dominates possession. With Brazil also in Group C, both sides know a result here could be decisive for the knockout race.
preview.homeForm: Scotland qualified by topping UEFA Group C, ending a 28-year wait to return to the World Cup.
preview.awayForm: Morocco won the 2025 AFCON on home soil and sit eighth in the FIFA rankings, top of Africa.
preview.homeKey: Scott McTominay, Napoli midfielder and Scotland's biggest goal threat.
preview.awayKey: Achraf Hakimi, PSG full-back driving Morocco's attacking width.
storylines: Morocco's new attack-minded era under Mohamed Ouahbi
Scotland's defence versus Africa's most fluid side
Brahim Diaz leading Morocco's creative new generation
preview.h2h: Scotland and Morocco last met at the 1998 World Cup, where Morocco won 3-0.
